WATCHDOG_ENABLED_DOC: Periodically inspect Volumio's built-in AirPlay receiver.
CHECK_INTERVAL_DOC: A conservative interval reduces load and avoids reacting to normal short transitions.
AUTO_RECOVERY_DOC: Allow bounded recovery after confirmed unexpected failures.
MDNS_CHECK_DOC: Optionally verify this player is advertised through Avahi/mDNS. Disabled by default.
MANUAL_RESTART_DOC: Safely ask Volumio to regenerate the AirPlay configuration and restart Shairport Sync.
